name: Foster Care Services Intake
description: Foster care services intake for child welfare social workers and foster families at the beginning of a foster care placement or a new foster family recruitment. Evaluates the placement needs, the family's capacity, the child's needs and history, the support services, and the reunification or permanency planning to produce a foster care intake profile with placement assessment and service plan.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
